---
title: "AutoRNAseq – Analysis Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
  word_document:
    toc: true
params:
  deg_table:    NULL
  go_result:    NULL
  kegg_result:  NULL
  gsea_result:  NULL
  hub_genes:    NULL
  biomarkers:   NULL
  ml_metrics:   NULL
  ml_method:    "Random Forest"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
    fig.width = 10, fig.height = 6
)
library(ggplot2)
library(DT)
library(knitr)
```

---

## 1. Differential Expression Summary

```{r deg-summary}
if (!is.null(params$deg_table)) {
    df <- params$deg_table
    cat("Total genes tested:", nrow(df), "\n")
    cat(
        "Significantly upregulated (padj<0.05, logFC>1):",
        sum(df$padj < 0.05 & df$log2FoldChange > 1, na.rm = TRUE), "\n"
    )
    cat(
        "Significantly downregulated (padj<0.05, logFC<-1):",
        sum(df$padj < 0.05 & df$log2FoldChange < -1, na.rm = TRUE), "\n"
    )
    kable(head(df[order(df$padj), ], 20), caption = "Top 20 Most Significant DEGs")
} else {
    cat("No DEG data provided.")
}
```

---

## 2. GO Enrichment Analysis

```{r go-results}
if (!is.null(params$go_result)) {
    go_df <- as.data.frame(params$go_result)
    cat("Total enriched GO terms:", nrow(go_df), "\n\n")
    kable(head(go_df[, c("Description", "GeneRatio", "BgRatio", "pvalue", "p.adjust", "Count")], 15),
        caption = "Top 15 Enriched GO Terms"
    )
    enrichplot::dotplot(params$go_result, showCategory = 15) +
        ggtitle("GO Enrichment Dotplot")
} else {
    cat("No GO enrichment data available.")
}
```

---

## 3. KEGG Pathway Analysis

```{r kegg-results}
if (!is.null(params$kegg_result)) {
    kegg_df <- as.data.frame(params$kegg_result)
    cat("Total enriched KEGG pathways:", nrow(kegg_df), "\n\n")
    kable(head(kegg_df[, c("Description", "GeneRatio", "pvalue", "p.adjust", "Count")], 15),
        caption = "Top 15 Enriched KEGG Pathways"
    )
    enrichplot::dotplot(params$kegg_result, showCategory = 15) +
        ggtitle("KEGG Pathway Dotplot")
} else {
    cat("No KEGG data available.")
}
```

---

## 4. Gene Set Enrichment Analysis (GSEA)

```{r gsea-results}
if (!is.null(params$gsea_result)) {
    gsea_df <- as.data.frame(params$gsea_result)
    cat("Total enriched gene sets:", nrow(gsea_df), "\n\n")
    kable(head(gsea_df[, c("Description", "NES", "pvalue", "p.adjust", "setSize")], 15),
        caption = "Top 15 GSEA Gene Sets"
    )
    enrichplot::dotplot(params$gsea_result, showCategory = 15) +
        ggtitle("GSEA Dotplot")
} else {
    cat("No GSEA data available.")
}
```

---

## 5. Protein–Protein Interaction Hub Genes

```{r ppi-hubs}
if (!is.null(params$hub_genes)) {
    cat("Top hub genes by degree centrality:\n\n")
    kable(head(params$hub_genes, 20), caption = "Hub Genes from PPI Network")

    df <- head(params$hub_genes, 15)
    ggplot(df, aes(x = reorder(Gene, Degree), y = Degree, fill = Betweenness)) +
        geom_col() +
        coord_flip() +
        scale_fill_gradient(low = "#AED6F1", high = "#1A5276") +
        labs(title = "Top Hub Genes — Degree Centrality", x = "Gene", y = "Degree") +
        theme_minimal()
} else {
    cat("No PPI data available.")
}
```

---

## 6. Machine Learning Biomarker Discovery

### 6.1 Model Performance

```{r ml-performance}
if (!is.null(params$ml_metrics)) {
    cat("ML Method used:", params$ml_method, "\n\n")
    kable(params$ml_metrics, caption = "Model Performance Metrics")
} else {
    cat("No ML performance data available.")
}
```

### 6.2 Top Biomarker Candidates

```{r biomarkers}
if (!is.null(params$biomarkers)) {
    kable(head(params$biomarkers, 25), caption = "Top 25 Biomarker Candidates by Combined Score")

    df <- head(params$biomarkers, 20)
    ggplot(df, aes(x = reorder(Gene, Biomarker_Score), y = Biomarker_Score, fill = Biomarker_Score)) +
        geom_col() +
        coord_flip() +
        scale_fill_gradient(low = "#AED6F1", high = "#1A5276") +
        labs(title = "Top Biomarker Candidates", x = "Gene", y = "Combined Biomarker Score") +
        theme_minimal()
} else {
    cat("No biomarker data available.")
}
```

---

## 7. Session Information

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```

---

*Report generated by **AutoRNAseq v1.0.0** — an automated end-to-end RNA-Seq interpretation platform.*
